name: MikroTik ROSE Data Server RDS2216-2XG-4S+4XS-2XQ
title: MikroTik ROSE Data Server RDS2216-2XG-4S+4XS-2XQ
description: Buy MikroTik ROSE Data Server RDS2216-2XG-4S+4XS-2XQ. Price from 1563.88 USD. Worldwide delivery! Full description, specifications, reviews, extended warranty option. ☎ +371 60 000 888.

detailed_description.heading: Unparalleled Performance
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik RDS2216-2XG-4S+4XS-2XQ is designed for high-performance networking, storage, and virtualization. Powered by an AL73400 16-core 2.0 GHz ARM 64-bit CPU and 32GB DDR4 RAM, this device delivers exceptional processing capabilities for enterprise and data center environments. The integrated RouterOS v7 operating system provides an advanced modular networking solution with License Level 6, ensuring flexibility, security, and scalability. Whether handling virtual machines, containers, or intensive routing tasks, the RDS2216-2XG-4S+4XS-2XQ is built to perform with unmatched efficiency. Its two USB ports (USB 3.0 Type-A and USB 2.0 Type-A) allow additional connectivity options, further enhancing its versatility.

detailed_description.heading: High-Speed Connectivity
detailed_description.text: With its cutting-edge networking architecture, the RDS2216-2XG-4S+4XS-2XQ offers unmatched connectivity for high-bandwidth applications. It features 2× 100G QSFP28, 4× 25G SFP28, 4× 10G SFP+, and 2× 10G Ethernet ports, providing the flexibility needed for modern enterprise networks, ISPs, and data-intensive environments. The additional SFF-8644 interface allows expanding NVMe storage or connecting to additional high-speed storage devices. Whether used for high-speed data transfers, backbone routing, or aggregation, this device ensures seamless, low-latency performance. The switch chip model 98DX4310 enhances packet forwarding efficiency, optimizing traffic management for mission-critical applications.

detailed_description.heading: Storage capabilities
detailed_description.text: The RDS2216-2XG-4S+4XS-2XQ features 20 U.2 PCIe Gen3 slots for ultra-fast NVMe storage, making it ideal for cloud-based applications, data centers, and high-performance computing environments. Additionally, it includes two M.2 SATA slots, enabling further storage expansion for demanding workloads. Advanced storage capabilities such as NVMe-TCP support, encryption layers, and modular storage configurations provide the flexibility required for a scalable and secure infrastructure. Whether running databases, virtualization environments, or large-scale data analytics, this device delivers exceptional read/write speeds and low latency for mission-critical applications.

detailed_description.heading: Reliable Power
detailed_description.text: Engineered for 24/7 operation, the RDS2216-2XG-4S+4XS-2XQ is equipped with dual hot-swappable power supplies, ensuring uninterrupted uptime and quick replacements without downtime. Its AC input range of 100-240V and maximum power consumption of 286W allow for an efficient power distribution system. Despite its high-performance capabilities, the RDS2216-2XG-4S+4XS-2XQ is designed with energy efficiency in mind, reducing heat output and power consumption without compromising performance. Its redundant power design and optimized cooling system make it an eco-friendly solution for data-heavy infrastructures, allowing businesses to lower operational costs while maintaining high-speed performance and reliability.

comments.name: Michael
comments.text: I work in cloud native sales andi. needed a platform to demo some specific functionality. I needed NVMEoverTCP to connect to my Kubernetes cluster and found this server. I could not be happier with the quality, speed and functionality. The only thing i would love to see is some graphical interface to show the storage space and functionality around partitioning.

comments.name: Bryan
comments.text:
Low cost entry to mass fast storage. RouterOS's storage features need more polishing to reach greater adoption. 

Even if you don't need to max out storage, it's a great alternative to the CCR2216 for routing.
